description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 29 hrs 13 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 13 mins. His tracked work was spread across 6 projects, and the most-used languages were Java, Other, and Markdown. There were no new GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded.
